_label_note: EU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public support-hotline bait, obfuscated VAT/tax/passport phone-shaped fragments, dotted-date and filing-reference phone bait, role/placeholder emails, template passport values, EU registry/ISIN/LEI/tax numeric fragments, log-id amount fragments, placeholder country-code phones, and negated MAE/contingent-MNPI language. Full EU member-state national-ID breadth and broader semantic GDPR special-category coverage remain ideal-tier gaps.
_label_tier_note: EU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

must_detect.matched_text: This note summarises GDPR (including Art 9), EU MAR, and CSRD/SFDR workflows; it contains only procedural guidance and public or stale information.

Compliance Note — EU issuer cross-border processing and disclosure controls for Nordhaven Renewables SE
This note summarises GDPR (including Art 9), EU MAR, and CSRD/SFDR workflows; it contains only procedural guidance and public or stale information.
PII scope: recruitment CVs, supplier contact data, and whistleblowing reports may be processed; no biometric or health data are required for the project, and any special-category items, if incidentally received, must be segregated with explicit consent or another Art 9 basis.
Cross-border transfers: limited support data may be accessed by processors in Storvia and Alderland (non-EEA); transfer impact assessments and 2021 SCCs are in place, and no persistent tracking on the investor relations site is enabled.
MAR context: all market-sensitive content referenced here was announced via a regulated information mechanism on 2025-02-15; current drafts contain only historical, already-disclosed facts.
Template fields (left blank in this pack): Name [ ], Address [ ], IBAN [ ], National ID [ ], Device ID [ ], Account No [ ]; placeholder values like IBAN XX00 1234 5678 9012 34 are non-operative.
Intentional PII cluster for control testing: a temporary logistics coordinator at Nordhaven Renewables SE, born 1990-04-03, typically on shift in Port District 14 of Rastenheim (Northlandia), uses handset asset tag NDH-8F00AX19 and signs into the “dock-ops” role mailbox; do not export this profile outside the EEA without SCCs.
